---
name: Profile pack proposal
about: Propose a new profile pack for a domain (coffee, music, books, etc.)
title: 'Profile pack: '
labels: profile-pack
assignees: ''
---

## Domain

(What domain does this pack cover? e.g., coffee taste, music preference, productivity styles.)

## Why this domain

(Who would use it? What product or use case is in mind?)

## Types

(List the types you'd classify users into. 4-8 types is the sweet spot. For each, give a one-line evidence-based description, not a vibes-based archetype.)

Example for fragrance:

- `citrus` — prefers fast-adapting top notes, allowing for more frequent layering
- `woody` — prefers slow-adapting base notes, fewer layering decisions per day
- ...

## Questions

(Sketch 3-5 questions × 3-5 options. Don't worry about exact wording yet.)

## Evidence basis

(What research, item pool, or domain knowledge grounds your type definitions? Avoid pseudo-science.)

## License

- [ ] I'm willing to release this profile pack's JSON spec under Apache 2.0
- [ ] Any test items I use are public domain or properly licensed for redistribution

## Anything else

(Existing tests/quizzes in this domain you've reviewed, references, etc.)
